name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for rvm

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Setup current shell to use a specific ruby version

name: --version
-v
options.description: Show version of rvm

options.name: --default
options.description: When used with ruby selection, sets a default ruby for new shells

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode

options.name: --force
options.description: Force install, removes old install & source before install

options.name: --all
options.description: Used with 'rvm list' to display 'most' available versions

options.name: --summary
options.description: Used with 'do' to print out a summary of the commands run

options.name: -C
options.description: Custom configure options, comma separated, double quote args that need quoting, default
